arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network manager link.

bandwidth.description: The bandwidth details of the link, including download and upload speeds.

description.description: A description of the network manager link.

id.description: The unique identifier of the network manager link.

provider_name.description: The name of the service provider for the link.

site_id.description: The identifier of the site associated with the network manager link.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the network manager link.
